dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.lead: Trade with institutional discipline—not emotional noise.

descPoints.label: Capital & balance:
descPoints.body: Liquidity health sits front-and-center.

descPoints.label: Your playbook note:
descPoints.body: No more scrambling for scribbles—the bias check lives right on the lane where you approve risk.

descPoints.label: Checklist:
descPoints.body: Tap once to certify every playbook rule straight from mission control.

descPoints.label: Mind state:
descPoints.body: A live needle shows whether you're cleared to operate—or should pause the session cold.

descPoints.label: Calendar:
descPoints.body: Equity arcs captured month over month.

descPoints.label: Your strategy:
descPoints.body: The plan never leaves sight.

checklist.title: Checklist
checklist.lead: Your procedural green-light before sizing risk

descPoints.label: 360° validation:
descPoints.body: Technique, risk, mindset—triple-check telemetry before committing size.

descPoints.label: Visual completion arc:
descPoints.body: The ring fills as gates close. Execute long/short orders only once the halo is sealed.

descPoints.label: Zero amnesia:
descPoints.body: Money-management doctrine is scripted into ritual.

descPoints.label: PDF audits:
descPoints.body: Export timestamped receipts of discipline whenever you debrief sponsors or coaches.

mental.title: Mindset
mental.lead: The tape punishes burnout. PAYCHEK is the biometric air-traffic tower that clears you—or grounds you—with iron discipline.

descPoints.label: Performance compass:
descPoints.body: A composite readiness score fed by rituals—sleep, training, mindfulness—signals when you're truly sharp enough to dominate.

descPoints.label: Momentum snapshot:
descPoints.body: Swipe once to gauge focus, energy and stress spikes. Crimson gauges trigger warnings before behavioural blow-ups arrive.

descPoints.label: Emotional telemetry:
descPoints.body: Label euphoria, tilt or neutrality to starve revenge trading and fragile confidence spirals.

descPoints.label: Pro warmup ritual:
descPoints.body: Lock pre-session habits. Prepared operators monetize preparation.

analyse.title: Analysis workspace
analyse.lead: Run live dossiers merging trade plans, granular technical blocks and wrap-up briefings.

descPoints.label: Plan worksheet:
descPoints.body: Direction, frames, dominant trend, regime and conviction live on one glass pane.

descPoints.label: Deep dives:
descPoints.body: Structure, indicators, smart-money context, liquidity, volume shelves and annotated captures.

descPoints.label: Executive wrap:
descPoints.body: Seal the dossier with a confidence score synced to instrument history.

strategie.title: Strategy
strategie.lead: Most desks lose the playbook mid-session. PAYCHEK pins it visibly so behavioural drift never wins.

descPoints.label: Custom pillars:
descPoints.body: Engineer frameworks that mirror your playbook—not canned templates borrowed online.

descPoints.label: Conviction ledger:
descPoints.body: Narrate the thesis beside every actionable idea.

descPoints.label: Instant alignment:
descPoints.body: No tab hunting; the playbook rides on Dashboard so rituals stay repeatable.

descPoints.label: Setup score:
descPoints.body: Rate idea quality upstream of execution—filter mediocre scalps upstream.

performance.title: Performance
performance.lead: Stop guessing where losses leak—quantify each friction point.

descPoints.label: Mind-map analytics:
descPoints.body: Stack principle-driven trades beside gut trades to visualize emotional drag on expectancy.

descPoints.label: Golden hour radar:
descPoints.body: Surface the clock windows delivering edge so energy focuses only when payoff density peaks.

descPoints.label: Session telemetry:
descPoints.body: Win rate, payoff ratios, sizing—slice data like a volatility desk adjusts models.

descPoints.label: Intensity guardrails:
descPoints.body: Pin daily trade cadence ceilings to choke overtrading and defend capital throughput.

descPoints.label: Reflection journal:
